publication.gate_value: sha256(source-release-review-v3: source-review-v2 inputs plus four reviewed wheelhouse digests; see review_digest.py)

distribution.corresponding_source_availability: published without additional charge in the same GitHub release as every Maia3 runtime archive
included_source_materials: UCI Grabber Maia3 build and packaging definitions
exact UCI Grabber release and wheelhouse-review workflow definitions
not_bundled_as_source: PyInstaller 6.21.0 bootloader and other reviewed wheel dependencies

required_written_review: Classify each frozen dependency as Corresponding Source, a separate aggregated work, or an applicable System Library/exclusion.
Require additional exact source archives or durable source offers whenever the classification demands them.
Confirm the release notices and reviewed source/build archive provide the materials or offers identified as necessary for every distributed runtime platform.
Repeat review whenever any source-review-v2 input or reviewed wheelhouse changes.
